member.name: M:UnityEngine.PathTracing.PostProcessing.UnityComputeProbePostProcessor.#ctor(UnityEngine.ComputeShader)
member.summary: UnityComputeProbePostProcessor constructor. Expects to be given the "ProbePostProcessing.compute" shader.
member.param: The compute shader containing post processing kernels. Should be the "ProbePostProcessing.compute" shader.
